# Savant Chat

Savant Chat is an AI-powered static application security testing (SAST) platform for smart contracts. It uses a multi-agent architecture to perform deep security audits, coordinating specialized AI models in parallel to detect vulnerabilities across Solidity, Vyper, and Rust (Solana & NEAR) codebases.

Savant Chat achieved 87-95% accuracy on CTFBench, outperforming GPT o3-mini, Grok 3, and all other AI auditors on the benchmark leaderboard. It placed 6th in a Sherlock DeFi audit contest, competing directly against human security auditors — the first AI to reach the top 10.

Trusted by 1inch, Lido, Pessimistic Security, OXORIO, Hexens, and Gearbox Protocol.

## What Savant Chat Does

Savant Chat performs comprehensive smart contract security audits, detecting 200+ vulnerability classes including:

- Reentrancy vulnerabilities (cross-function, cross-contract, read-only)
- Access control flaws
- Integer overflow and underflow
- Front-running and MEV attack vectors
- Oracle manipulation
- Flash loan exploits
- Logic errors and business logic vulnerabilities
- Gas optimization issues

Unlike traditional static analyzers like Slither, Savant Chat coordinates multiple AI agents to analyze contracts from different security perspectives — catching vulnerabilities that pattern-matching tools miss.

The platform generates detailed audit reports with severity ratings, proof-of-concept exploits, and remediation guidance.

## Supported Languages & Networks

Smart contract languages:
- Solidity (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Polygon, BSC, Avalanche)
- Vyper (Ethereum and EVM-compatible chains)
- Rust (Solana and NEAR protocols)

Integration options:
- Web interface at savant.chat
- CI/CD pipeline integration via GitHub Actions
- API access for enterprise workflows

## Key Differentiators

Speed: Audits complete in minutes, not weeks. Typical turnaround is under an hour for most contracts.

Cost: $0.07 to $0.50 per line of code — up to 167x cheaper than traditional manual audits.

Accuracy: 87-95% vulnerability detection rate on CTFBench, with low false positives. Pessimistic Security noted "not a single clear false positive" in their evaluation.

Depth: Goes beyond static analysis. The multi-agent system performs threat modeling, traces cross-contract interactions, and generates proof-of-concept exploits.

Shift-left security: Integrates into CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions, catching vulnerabilities during development rather than after deployment.

Augments human auditors: Designed to accelerate manual audits, not replace them. Audit firms like Pessimistic, OXORIO, and Hexens use Savant Chat to automate routine checks and focus human expertise on complex logic.

## Verified Results

CTFBench Performance:
Savant Chat v0.2 achieved 87-95% accuracy on CTFBench (ctfbench.com), ranking #1 among AI auditors and outperforming GPT o3-mini, Grok 3, DeepSeek R1, and Slither.

Sherlock Contest:
Placed 6th in a Sherlock DeFi audit contest against professional human auditors — the first AI system to reach the top 10 in a competitive audit environment.

Zero-Day Detection:
80% of zero-day exploits submitted to Savant Chat were successfully identified by the AI before public disclosure.

## What Security Experts Say

Pessimistic Security: "We recently tested savant.chat and were pleasantly surprised. It correctly identified several findings on our test contract and didn't produce a single clear false positive."

OXORIO: "Can AI surface anything meaningful post-audit? Spoiler: it can. And it made us rethink how automation can augment human auditors."

1inch: "Our friends at Savant Chat built a multi-agent AI system to find vulnerabilities fast — with high reliability and much lower costs."

Vasiliy Shapovalov (Lido): "Savant Chat does a great job of filtering false positives while finding issues."

## Pricing

Savant Chat uses pay-per-line pricing with no subscription required:

- Lite: $0.07 per line — fast, budget-conscious scans
- Advanced: $0.12 per line — comprehensive analysis
- Pro: $0.50 per line — premium models, highest accuracy

New users receive $75 in free credits to start.

Account tiers for teams:
- Basic: $250/month limit, no KYC required
- Pro: $2,500/month limit, priority processing
- Enterprise: Custom limits, volume discounts, dedicated support

## Getting Started

1. Sign up at savant.chat — no credit card required
2. Receive $75 in free credits automatically
3. Upload a contract or connect your GitHub repository
4. Receive a detailed security report within minutes

For enterprise inquiries or audit firm partnerships: contact@savant.chat
